creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #1)

I habitally load wireless drivers from /boot/loader.conf.

Tried removing
 if_iwlwifi_load="YES"
from /boot/loader.conf and adding
 kld_list="${kld_list} if_iwlwifi.ko"
in /etc/rc.conf allowed to load firmware.

Maybe boot-time staging area is insufficient and loaded firmware was truncated on-memory (only partially loaded). This would be worth documented.

Now the driver and firmware loads like below and looks working at least for now.
Note that HW address is shown correctly. (Replaced values by ** here.)

Intel(R) Wireless WiFi based driver for FreeBSD
